title: loxocalyx urticifolius var. decemnervius
intro: Loxocalyx urticifolius var. decemnervius, also known as a variety of the Loxocalyx urticifolius plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is used as a medicinal plant due to its properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, derived from its leaves, bark, and roots. The medicinal properties of Loxocalyx urticifolius var. decemnervius are said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
